channel.title: LLM Timeline — Silo AI Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from Silo AI.

item.title: Viking (Silo AI)
item.description: Parameters: Viking License: open Type: model Viking uses an architecture similar to Llama 2, with flash attention, rotary embeddings, grouped query attention and supports a 4k sequence length'

item.title: Poro (Silo AI)
item.description: Parameters: Poro License: open Type: model Uses a BLOOM architecture with ALiBi embeddings to allow for context window extrapolation. While model architecture for the initial model has been kept simple, future models under progress will support additional capabilities, such as flash attention, rotary embeddings and grouped query attention.'
